evidence.evidence_text: The effect of activator concentration on the residual strength of alkali-activated ﬂy ash pastes subjected to thermal load Alaa M. Rashad a,⇑, Sayieda R. Zeedan b a Building Materials Research and Quality Control Institute, Housing & Building National Research Center, HBRC, Cairo, Egypt b Raw Building Materials Technology and Processing Research Institute, Housing & Building National Research Center, HBRC, Cairo, Egypt article info Article history: Received 8 May 2010 Received in revised form 10
Residual and relative residual compressive strength results of AAFA are illustrated in Figs. 7 and 8 after exposure to elevated temperatures.
